briefs.title: Port Property Tax Designations Updated for 2026 — Two BC Marine Terminals Named
briefs.summary: BC updated the list of properties that qualify for special port property tax treatment, replacing the 2025 list with a new 2026 list. Two marine terminals — Alliance Grain Terminal and PKM Canada Marine Terminal — are designated for the 2026 tax year.

key_dates.label: BC Eligible Port Property Designation — 2026 tax year takes effect
